channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin's latest fear unlocked as rate hike bets rise and bond markets crumble
item.description: For now, surging oil prices and persistent geopolitical tensions are driving inflation fears and weakening traditional safe-haven assets.

item.title: Why CoinDesk PitchFest matters heading into Miami
item.description: Lin examines the role of the Consensus event in providing founders with structured access to the sector’s most influential decision-makers.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: BitFuFu cuts self-mined Bitcoin in 2025, shifts focus to cloud mining
item.description: Bitcoin miner BitFuFu decreased its revenue from self-hosted mining operations by 60% in 2025 in a push to cloud mining.

item.title: Crypto wallet maker Ledger taps former Circle exec as CFO to help lead IPO push
item.description: The crypto security firm is expanding its U.S. footprint and strengthening its leadership team as it prepares for a potential public listing.

item.title: Crypto part of Canada’s ‘core’ financial system, but risk concerns remain
item.description: The crypto industry has seen a number of regulatory changes over the past year, with the Canadian government taking a risk-management, rules-first approach.

item.title: Bitcoin RSI signals potential bottom as analysts flag key setup
item.description: Bitcoin’s RSI is nearing a key level, with analysts saying a higher low is needed to support a potential continuation in BTC price.

item.title: Bitcoin whale holding $147M wakes after 13 years, makes tiny $56 transfer
item.description: A Bitcoin wallet inactive since 2012 has moved $56 worth of BTC, spotlighting a stash now valued at roughly $147 million after more than 13 years dormant.

item.title: Kalshi valuation doubles to $22 billion in latest funding round: Bloomberg
item.description: The new $1 billion investment round indicates that interest in the embattled prediction market remains.

item.title: Altcoin Volume Slumps 80% Amid ‘Tighter’ Monetary Conditions
item.description: A changing investor landscape and Bitcoin’s failed breakout attempt led to an 80% drop in altcoin trading volume from October.

item.title: Stablecoin issuers and fintechs race to own payment rails
item.description: Leading crypto and fintech companies are competing to capture growing revenue from stablecoin payments by launching their own settlement infrastructure.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aptos (APT) gains 6.3% as index rises
item.description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH), up 2.5% from Thursday, joined Aptos (APT) as a top performer.

item.title: Coinbase introduces stock perpetual futures contracts for non-U.S. customers
item.description: The contracts trade 24/7, are cash-settled in USDC and allow for up to 10-times leverage on single-stock contracts and 20-times on ETF products.

item.title: Iran war volatility is driving oil trading boom on Hyperliquid, says JPMorgan
item.description: Round-the-clock oil trading on Hyperliquid is drawing investors beyond crypto as geopolitical shocks expose gaps in traditional markets, the bank said.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Rebounds as Oil Falls
item.description: Crypto bounced as traders bet the Iran war may end sooner than feared, while prediction markets just had a blockbuster day.

item.title: Live exclusive with @intocryptoverse – Benjamin Cowen on Binance Square, March 20. Episode 1 of Blockchain 100 – Binance's flagship series on the people shaping crypto. March 20 · 14:00 UTC · Live on Binance Square Set a reminder 👉 binance.com/en/ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5qQ0dwTzl5cHJmNTA1OUVVcFpzVU53SzdHakhZUXU3amRMN3FpTnV4dmdGVEhLVzg4MHRTc3B3MUdtTXh4aUR6UHdzZkZocE1EdGFpYWQ3ZXowa3c3?oc=5" target="_blank">Live exclusive with @intocryptoverse – Ben…

item.title: Morgan Stanley files amended S-1 for MSBT Bitcoin ETF
item.description: The proposed spot Bitcoin ETF outlines seed capital, listing plans and trading partners in its latest filing as it moves closer to a potential market debut.

item.title: Coinbase launches 24/7 stock perps for non-US traders
item.description: Coinbase has launched stock perpetual futures for non-US traders, expanding its push to offer round-the-clock access to multiple asset classes.

item.title: Bitcoin holds steady, with one analyst seeing the upside emerging
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 20, 2026

item.title: Apple iOS Malware Targets Crypto Apps on Unpatched iPhones: Google
item.description: The DarkSword exploit chain affects older versions of iOS 18, delivering malware that specifically hunts for exchange and wallet apps.

item.title: Ripple survey finds 72% of finance leaders see digital assets as essential
item.description: Stablecoins and custody lead adoption priorities, with firms focusing on how to build or source digital asset infrastructure.

item.title: Crypto market steadies as derivatives signal caution, macro pressure builds
item.description: BTC holds near $70,500 as derivatives turn defensive, macro risks weigh on sentiment and altcoins show pockets of strength.

item.title: South Korea tax agency seeks private crypto custodian after security lapses
item.description: South Korea’s tax agency is seeking a private custodian for seized crypto after a wallet seed phrase leak exposed government-held assets.

item.title: Bitcoin vs gold shows potential bottom signals as BTC bulls defend $70K
item.description: Technical indicators hint at a possible reversal in BTC’s relative performance, as traders watch whether key support levels can hold.

item.title: Bitcoin Rallies to $71K as Bessent Mulls Lifting Some Iran Oil Sanctions
item.description: Bitcoin bounced Friday as U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent outlined possible responses to soaring oil prices.

item.title: Ripple data reveals stablecoins are becoming the go-to tool for corporate treasury
item.description: A new Ripple survey of more than 1,000 global finance leaders finds that digital assets are now seen as a strategic necessity rather than an optional experiment.

item.title: Bitcoin’s price action looks dangerously similar to the pattern that sent it crashing to $60,000
item.description: The recent price action echoes the November–January pattern, showing weak conviction among the “buy the dip” crowd.

item.title: Quantum risk real, but not all crypto wallets equally vulnerable: Galaxy
item.description: Galaxy Digital’s Will Owens says most crypto wallets aren’t exposed to quantum risks, with vulnerabilities limited to cases where public keys are revealed.

item.title: Super Micro co-founder arrested over alleged $2.5B AI chip smuggling scheme
item.description: US authorities say they have charged and arrested Supermicro co-founder Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw for allegedly funnelling $2.5 billion in AI servers to China through shell companies.

item.title: Gemini sued over post-IPO strategy shift, declining stock price
item.description: Crypto exchange Gemini is facing a proposed class-action lawsuit over what a complaint alleges is an “abrupt corporate pivot to a prediction-market-centric business model” after its IPO.

item.title: Bitcoin jumps to $70,800 as oil retreats; ether and XRP lag
item.description: Oil prices slipped as major economies announced joint efforts to stabilize energy markets.

item.title: Appeals court denies Kalshi request to block Nevada enforcement action
item.description: US gaming lawyer Daniel Wallach says a Nevada state court-issued restraining order against Kalshi appears imminent, preventing it from offering sports-related contracts.

item.title: Morgan Stanley sets MSBT ticker and $1 million seed capital for bitcoin ETF
item.description: Morgan Stanley has filed to launch a spot Bitcoin ETF with the ticker MSBT and a $1 million seed at debut.

item.title: Kentucky Senate Urged to Strip Hardware Wallet Provision From Crypto Bill
item.description: A crypto kiosk bill in Kentucky includes language that could effectively outlaw self-custody, drawing industry backlash.

item.title: Major gold trade group releases framework for tokenized gold
item.description: The World Gold Council says it will develop a platform to connect physical gold to the systems used to issue and manage tokenized gold products.

item.title: Nvidia Deepens Grip on Cloud AI With Major AWS Chip Deal
item.description: The deal would help scale capacity as AWS builds its own chips, revealing deeper reliance on Nvidia’s stack as usage keeps growing.

item.title: If Bitcoin continues to follow 2014, then the next leg down could be sooner than most expect. Usually there is weakness by Bitcoin going into April of midterm years. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBDUENuWktYYkNGdkFmRDhDeWk3NUJtaWk3YVNPUGtvUEZGOFFsN2Z2NlhlNHJjNVFXT1ltRGZYTklJZmxMTEdSLWtEbFZHTEtrekhkWFlhSm9Db2tyOWN1d1NxNTJzbDQ?oc=5" target="_blank">If Bitcoin continues to fol…

item.title: Gemini shares surge 6% after hours on Q4 earnings
item.description: Gemini reported its fourth quarter revenues were $60.3 million, which co-founders Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss say is its highest quarterly revenue in three years.

item.title: FBI warns fake FBI token on Tron is trying to scam users
item.description: Scammers impersonating the FBI via a token are telling Tron users they are under investigation and must complete a check to avoid having their assets frozen.

item.title: Solana DApps revenue falls to 18-month low as SOL price risks $80 retest
item.description: Weakening onchain activity and bearish derivatives data suggest that a SOL price recovery will take longer than most investors anticipate.

item.title: Coinbase, Apex Group tokenize Bitcoin Yield Fund on Base
item.description: Coinbase Asset Management’s Anthony Bassili says the Bitcoin Yield Fund’s tokenized share class checks “identity and eligibility at the token level” for compliance.

item.title: Bitcoin Trails Money Supply Growth as Energy Costs and Rates Bite
item.description: Higher fuel costs and restrictive financial conditions are absorbing consumer liquidity, helping explain why expanding global money supply has yet to translate into gains for Bitcoin.

item.title: Bits to Bricks: Can Stablecoins Prevent De-Dollarization?
item.description: Atlantic Council's Alisha Chhangani joins Bits to Bricks to discuss stablecoins, dollar dominance, CBDCs, and the future of digital currency.

item.title: Crypto Clarity Act inches toward Senate hearing as lawmakers weigh legislative trades
item.description: The White House may be reviewing fresh legislative text, and lawmakers are reportedly weighing offers to banks of other, unrelated provisions for their support.

item.title: Gemini Shares Rise After Hours as Investors Back Shift Beyond Crypto Trading
item.description: Investors focused on a shift toward steadier revenue streams and a push into prediction markets, even as trading volumes declined.

item.title: Microsoft Launches MAI-Image-2 Text-to-Image Model—And It's Better Than Expected
item.description: Microsoft's AI image generator offers impressive realism and text rendering, but strict content limits and 1:1-only output hold it back.

item.title: Fake FBI Crypto Tokens Are Being Used to Threaten Tron Users, Authorities Warn
item.description: The FBI warned of a new threat emerging on Tron’s network, with users receiving tokens that aren’t actually from federal law enforcement.

item.title: Solana Treasury Forward Industries Uses Loan to Buy Back Shares After 89% Price Dive
item.description: Solana treasury firm Forward Industries bought back more than 6 million shares for $27.4 million as it seeks to add shareholder value.

item.title: 21 questions in 21 minutes. Bitcoin, AI, and innovation in the digital age with @PresidioBitcoin. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFB6YU1yeU1pRVpUNk9wWWJtc1dBV0pOd1FKaU81YUo4dkxRSVNVQUV5c0RWZ2Q2Sm5WSEdYUHBqNFBFcVRYdE9CdDNTdnZyQ1BZMzZ5T1A1Nmw0ZWc?oc=5" target="_blank">21 questions in 21 minutes. Bitcoin, AI, an…

item.title: Telling Your Chatbot You Have a Mental Health Condition Can Change the Answer You Get
item.description: A study finds that mentioning a mental health condition can increase AI refusals, including on legitimate tasks.

item.title: JUST IN: North Carolina introduces bill for a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve 🇺🇸 Today, it already passed the first reading 👏 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBSME5nX2FJVjBfeW1XYkN5Mm9ZV0ZwNGEyMXByNExfZks2Z241ckZLLVNYYktTbFFibGQxYmJiU3NReGJ3Sk1pQm5oU3ZtSERMbVRpQnF4aDlmblZmVFVDRkdPVDk2cUU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: North Carolina int…

item.title: JUST IN: North Carolina introduces bill to "establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve for the state." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5PWkkwQ3kzZnhvMkJwM1BKdFFhOUY0YVZuNE5Hc2xPU3BoWmVxYzBUMDN6ZlVoYkZHT2F5aGRiUU50OS1ZOFlocEVORkMyYXFNZVJEcWpZVDN3aWRiTHVlamVn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: North Carolina introduces…

item.title: DeFi risk management giant Gauntlet sees $380 million exit as OKX crypto campaign ends
item.description: Gauntlet noted that deposits are now back to same levels before the campaign, and has navigated large capital swings before due to incentive campaign endings, airdrops, and shifts in market conditions which regularly produce short-period s…

item.title: Crypto markets – and the American people – deserve clarity
item.description: The SEC is pivoting away from its previous regulatory strategy.

item.title: Appeals court clears way for Nevada to temporarily ban prediction market Kalshi
item.description: The Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals denied a legal effort by Kalshi to stave off an expected temporary restraining order from the state of Nevada.

item.title: Coinbase's bitcoin yield fund goes onchain with Apex's tokenization push
item.description: The Coinbase Bitcoin Yield Fund's tokenized share class runs on Base as the $3.5 trillion fund services giant Apex applies tokenization across its business.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Prepares Bitcoin ETF for NYSE Arca Launch, Picking MSBT Ticker
item.description: Morgan Stanley updated its Bitcoin ETF S-1 filing, adding Fidelity as custodian and revealing the NYSE Arca ticker MSBT.

item.title: XRP Treasury Firm Evernorth Inches Closer to Public Listing With $685 Million Stash
item.description: Evernorth aims to become the largest publicly traded XRP treasury firm and is expected to launch with more than 473 million XRP.

item.title: First Working Quantum Battery Proves Bigger Really Does Mean Faster
item.description: Australian researchers built a battery that charges in femtoseconds, stores energy for nanoseconds, and gets faster the larger it grows—defying every rule conventional batteries follow.

item.title: Wall Street heavyweight Cantor among investment banks pitching FalconX for its potential IPO
item.description: Crypto trading firm FalconX's CEO has previously said it is considering a public listing.
